entities.name: Pure Encapsulations O.N.E. Multi
entities.context: Multivitamin containing methylated B12/Folate, CoQ10, ALA. Taken with food during Phase 4 meal.

entities.name: Pure Encapsulations B12 Folate
entities.context: Methylcobalamin + Metafolin® supplement for methylation support, stacks with Multi.

entities.name: Fish Oil (EPA/DHA)
entities.context: 1-2g combined dose for brain structure and inflammation. Must take with food to avoid reflux.

entities.name: Bacopa Monnieri
entities.context: 300mg fat-soluble nootropic for BDNF support, taken with meal.

entities.name: Curcuma Pura (Curcumin)
entities.context: Fat-soluble anti-inflammatory supplement, must take with fat-containing meal.

entities.name: Probiotic
entities.context: Supports gut health and Tirzepatide GI tolerance.

entities.name: Psyllium Husk
entities.context: 5-10g fiber supplement essential for GI motility on Tirzepatide, taken with 12oz+ water.

entities.name: Tirzepatide
entities.context: Medication V is taking; several supplements are calibrated around its GI side effects.

entities.name: Phase 4 Protocol
entities.context: The One Meal phase (~30 min after shake) where all with-food supplements are consolidated with a protein-forward brunch.

entities.name: Methylation Support
entities.context: Biochemical pathway supported by stacking B12 Folate with O.N.E. Multi.

entities.name: BDNF Support
entities.context: Brain-derived neurotrophic factor support via Bacopa Monnieri.

entities.name: Pure Encapsulations
entities.context: Supplement manufacturer for O.N.E. Multi and B12 Folate products.
